name: skill_self_learning
description: Skill promotion evaluation pipeline. Evaluates learning candidates via eval, produces a human-approved promotion proposal. Does NOT create SKILL.md autonomously — that step requires /promote (architect + user approval). Dequeue happens when select_candidate completes (not on workflow end), so later node failures cannot stall the queue. Eval outcome (proposed/failed/overlap) is persisted to eval_history.json by the coordinator to prevent indefinite re-enqueueing.

nodes.description: 從 promotion_queue.json 取出第一個候選，讀取 learning 內容，確認 suggested_skill
nodes.instruction: 1. Read `shared/workflows/state/promotion_queue.json` (bash cat or Read tool). Take the FIRST entry — use its `learning_id` and `suggested_skill` fields. 2. Run `bash shared/tools/conda-python.sh shared/tools/kb.py read <learning_id>` to retrieve the learning content. 3. If the queue entry has a non-empty `suggested_skill`, use it as-is. If absent or empty, derive a concise kebab-case skill name from the learning content (e.g. `bom-dual-query`). 4. List `.claude/skills-on-demand/` — if a directory with that exact name exists AND its SKILL.md content already covers this learning topic, set `overlap_found: true`. 5. Complete with `{"learning_id": "<id>", "suggested_skill": "<name>", "overlap_found": false}`.

nodes.description: 準備 5 個 trigger + 5 個 non-trigger 評測 prompt（若 overlap_found=true 則跳過）
nodes.instruction: Read `select_candidate` outputs. If `overlap_found` is true, complete with `{"skipped": true, "reason": "skill already covers this learning"}`. Otherwise write eval prompts to `shared/workflows/state/eval_set_<learning_id>.json` with shape `{"triggers": [...5 prompts...], "non_triggers": [...5 prompts...]}`. Complete with `{"eval_set_path": "shared/workflows/state/eval_set_<learning_id>.json"}`.

nodes.description: 執行 skill-eval-grader 評測擬議 Skill 草稿（若 prepare_eval_set 已 skipped 則跳過）
nodes.instruction: If prepare_eval_set was skipped, complete with `{"skipped": true, "pass_rate": 0, "reason": "overlap, no eval needed"}`. Otherwise delegate to skill-eval-grader agent: provide the eval set path and the draft SKILL.md content (compose in memory, do NOT write it to disk). Complete with `{"grading_json_path": "shared/workflows/state/grading_<learning_id>.json", "pass_rate": <0.0-1.0>}`.

nodes.description: 若 pass_rate >= 0.7，寫入升級提案 JSON 並通知使用者執行 /promote。不修改 DB，不建立 SKILL.md。
nodes.instruction:
GOVERNANCE: Do NOT create or modify any SKILL.md file, and do NOT call kb.py add-learning or kb.py update. Actual skill creation requires explicit user approval via /promote → architect.

Read outputs from select_candidate (learning_id, suggested_skill) and run_skill_eval (pass_rate).

- If overlap_found=true OR pass_rate < 0.7: complete with `{"proposed": false, "reason": "<overlap|below_threshold>"}`.
- If pass_rate >= 0.7:
  1. Create directory `shared/workflows/state/proposals/` if it does not exist.
  2. Write `shared/workflows/state/proposals/<learning_id>_proposal.json` with content: `{"learning_id": "<id>", "suggested_skill": "<name>", "pass_rate": <rate>, "grading_json_path": "<path>", "proposed_at": "<iso-timestamp>", "status": "awaiting_approval", "next_step": "Run /promote to review and approve creation of this Skill"}`.
  3. Complete with `{"proposed": true, "proposal_path": "shared/workflows/state/proposals/<learning_id>_proposal.json", "next_step": "Run /promote"}`.

Note: the coordinator dequeues <learning_id> from promotion_queue.json when select_candidate completes (not when this workflow ends). The coordinator also writes the eval outcome (proposed/below_threshold/overlap) to eval_history.json on workflow completion — no manual action needed.
